description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND the selected date has completed games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND a completed game tile has focus
steps.result:
THEN the game tile is increased in size
AND the game tile has a white border
AND there is a slight gradient from the top
AND the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the away team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the final score displays between the away and home team logos
AND "FINAL" is displayed in white text left justified below the match up header
AND the winning pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background, left justified below "FINAL"
AND W <winning_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "W <winning_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND the losing pitcher headshot is displayed below the winning pitcher's headshot with the team primary color as a circular background
AND L <losing_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "L <losing_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND (if a game has a saving pitcher) the saving pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background below the losing pitcher headshot
AND S <saving_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of saving pitcher headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "S <saving_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND the bases/outs indicator is displayed right-center justified in the non-match up portion of the game tile
AND the base/out indicators are gray in color

NOTES: 
1. A silhouette image will display if a player headshot is not available
2. If pitcher data is not available, "-" will display in its place
3. Any partner tags will be hidden when there is a saving pitcher and the Game Tile is focused
